playlist_strategy: Building intensity starting with atmospheric orchestral elements, escalating to massive brass, heavy percussion, and soaring choirs to push through sets, then slowly resolving back down to an epic but calm cooldown.

tracks.title: Rise of the Titans
tracks.youtube_title: Rise of the Titans ⚡ Epic Warmup Music | Motivation
tracks.hook_type: Slow swelling strings and deep impacts
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic ambient orchestral, slow swelling strings, deep impacts, D minor, 85 bpm, atmospheric buildup, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A lone warrior standing at the base of a massive mountain, atmospheric fog, deep blue lighting, cinematic composition, epic scale.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your workout right with this epic cinematic warmup track. 'Rise of the Titans' provides the perfect atmospheric buildup to get your mind and body ready for a massive session. Focus your energy and prepare for the lifting ahead.

tracks.title: Forging Iron
tracks.youtube_title: Forging Iron ⚡ Heavy Orchestral Workout | Pump Music
tracks.hook_type: Metallic percussion strikes and distorted bass
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial cinematic hybrid, metallic percussion, distorted synth bass, staccato strings, C minor, 95 bpm, steady aggressive groove, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Glowing red hot iron on a massive anvil in a dark industrial forge, sparks flying, cinematic lighting, gritty texture, highly detailed.
tracks.youtube_description: Get the blood flowing with 'Forging Iron'. This industrial cinematic track blends heavy metallic percussion with driving strings to lock in your focus during your activation sets. Perfect motivation for those early heavy working sets.

tracks.title: Battle Lines
tracks.youtube_title: Battle Lines ⚡ Aggressive Epic Music | Gym beast
tracks.hook_type: Fast driving ostinato strings and heavy brass blasts
tracks.style_prompt: Epic action orchestral, fast driving ostinato strings, aggressive heavy brass blasts, marching snares, E minor, 110 bpm, rising tension, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: An army marching into an epic battle, crimson skies, dark silhouettes, intense action, cinematic lighting, sharp shadows, high contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Cross the threshold into your heavy sets with 'Battle Lines'. This aggressive cinematic anthem uses driving strings and massive brass to push your adrenaline to the next level. Let the epic battle music fuel your next PR.

tracks.title: Unstoppable Force
tracks.youtube_title: Unstoppable Force ⚡ Intense Workout Anthem | Motivation
tracks.hook_type: Heavy electric guitar riff mixed with heroic brass
tracks.listening_scenario: High intensity intervals or heavy compound lifts
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic rock hybrid, heavy electric guitar riff, heroic brass melody, pounding rock drums mixed with cinematic impacts, G minor, 120 bpm, relentless groove, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A powerful athlete breaking through chains, glowing electric blue energy, dynamic action pose, cinematic lighting, intense power.
tracks.youtube_description: Become an 'Unstoppable Force' in the gym with this massive cinematic rock hybrid track. Combining shredding guitars with epic orchestral brass, this high-energy anthem is designed to help you crush your most difficult sets.

tracks.title: Gods of Olympus
tracks.youtube_title: Gods of Mlynpus ⚡ Massive Epic Choir Workout | Peak
tracks.hook_type: Massive staccato choir chanting over thunderous drums
tracks.listening_scenario: Attempting one-rep max or absolute failure sets
tracks.style_prompt: Epic choral orchestral, massive staccato mixed choir chanting, thunderous taiko drum patterns, soaring brass, A minor, 130 bpm, triumphant epic peak, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental with choir.
tracks.image_prompt: A glowing golden figure holding up the sky amidst ancient pillars, epic majestic lighting, divine power, cinematic god-like scale.
tracks.youtube_description: Summon the strength of the gods for your absolute heaviest lifts. 'Gods of Olympus' features a massive, thundering choir and explosive percussion that will give you the ultimate adrenaline spike for your one-rep max.

tracks.title: Maximum Velocity
tracks.youtube_title: Maximum Velocity ⚡ Fast Epic Cyberpunk | HIIT Cardio
tracks.hook_type: Pulsing distorted synth sequence and fast tribal drums
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic cyberpunk hybrid, pulsing distorted 16th-note synth arpeggios, fast electronic action drums blended with cinematic string ostinatos, F minor, 145 bpm, hyperactive energy, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A futuristic runner sprinting through a neon-lit cyberpunk city in the rain, dynamic motion blur, intense speed, glowing pink and cyan lights, cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your cardio and HIIT to the absolute limit with 'Maximum Velocity'. This fast-paced, 145 BPM cinematic cyberpunk track gives you relentless energy and driving synths to keep your feet moving when it counts the most.

tracks.title: Conquer the Peak
tracks.youtube_title: Conquer the Peak ⚡ Epic Heroic Gym Music | Victory
tracks.hook_type: Soaring, triumphant french horn melody over rolling snares
tracks.listening_scenario: Finishing the final heavy sets with victory in mind
tracks.style_prompt: Heroic epic orchestral, soaring triumphant brass melody, rolling snare drum cadences, bright sweeping string sections, C major, 125 bpm, uplifting victory mood, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A victorious athlete standing on top of a jagged mountain peak at sunrise, bright orange light breaking through clouds, epic achievement, cinematic wide shot.
tracks.youtube_description: Taste the victory of a completed workout. 'Conquer the Peak' is a triumphant, heroic orchestral piece designed to power you through those grueling final sets when you need that extra push of uplifting motivation.

tracks.title: Through the Fire
tracks.youtube_title: Through the Fire ⚡ Epic Percussion Music | Relentless
tracks.hook_type: Complex, aggressive taiko and snare rhythms fighting together
tracks.listening_scenario: Burnout sets and sheer willpower exercises
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic percussion ensemble, entirely rhythmic, complex driving taiko drum arrays, aggressive toms and surdo impacts, massive sub bass drops, B minor, 115 bpm, relentless primal energy, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Massive war drums burning with fire in a dark cavern, sparks flying upward, primal raw energy, cinematic deep contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Find your primal rhythm and push through the pain barrier. 'Through the Fire' is an intensely driven, pure percussion track. Let the relentless booming taiko drums carry you through your final burnout sets.

tracks.title: Echoes of Glory
tracks.youtube_title: Echoes of Glory ⚡ Epic Orchestral Cooldown | Recovery
tracks.hook_type: Gentle majestic cello solo with floating choir background
tracks.listening_scenario: Walking off the pump, slow active recovery
tracks.style_prompt: Uplifting ambient orchestral, gentle majestic solo cello, soft ethereal female choir chords, sweeping harp glissandos, G major, 80 bpm, calming but epic aftermath mood, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental with choir.
tracks.image_prompt: A serene calm lake reflecting a starry night sky after a great storm, peaceful, majestic, ethereal lighting, high fantasy cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: You've survived the battle. Now, let 'Echoes of Glory' ease your heart rate down. This beautiful, soothing cinematic masterpiece provides the perfect transition from an intense workout into your deep recovery phase.

tracks.title: A Warrior's Rest
tracks.youtube_title: A Warrior's Rest ⚡ Deep Cinematic Meditation | Stretching
tracks.hook_type: Low drone with sparse traditional flute and delayed piano
tracks.listening_scenario: Static stretching and deep breathing meditation
tracks.style_prompt: Deep cinematic ambient, endless low drone, sparse emotional duduk flute, distant reverberant felt piano, A minor, 65 bpm, extreme calm and space, hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: An ancient warrior resting against a massive mossy tree in a dark mystical forest, streams of light cutting through the canopy, peaceful, meditative, cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: End your session with 'A Warrior's Rest'. This deep cinematic ambient track is crafted to lower cortisol, control your breathing, and help you find peace during your final static stretching routines. Rest up for the next session.
